name: Apple Dumpling Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, water, and cinnamon in a medium saucepan. Bring to a boil. Remove from heat.
2. Add margarine and set aside.
3. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt. Mix with shortening and milk until a dough forms.
4. Roll the dough on a floured surface about 1/4 inch thick.
5. Spread apples over the surface of the dough. Sprinkle with cinnamon and sugar.
6. Roll up the dough into individual dumplings.
7. Slice each dumpling into 1-inch rolls.
8. Place the slices in a 9 x 13 baking pan.
9. Pour any remaining syrup over the dumplings.
10. Bake for 45 minutes at 350°F.
